subtitle: Marie Cooksey absent all week; James Salas Guillen returns 18 June
context: Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-12 June, returning 13 June, with multiple active dependencies including DTP1092 College Staff in PeopleXD Proposal comments awaiting her input and H&S support queue coverage by Kevin and Chris. James Salas Guillen is on leave until 18 June, blocking H&S administrative tasks and DSE system monitoring - his handover document outlines outstanding items requiring attention. The DSE data import to Cardinus went live 5 June and is functioning, but Marie needs confirmation on contractor record creation processes. The Strategic H&S Modular System (SHSMS) evaluation weightings require review with Helen Harbour this week. Your occupational health report from Helena Uddin arrived 8 June and requires your consent response. The most time-critical deadline is OWL network maintenance on 11 June (Wednesday) requiring IT coordination. Open first: Marie Handover 8-12 June email to understand H&S queue coverage and escalation protocols.

urgent.title: Marie Cooksey absent - active projects blocked
urgent.sub: Marie is on leave 8-12 June (returns 13 June). DTP1092 College Staff in PXD Proposal has her pending comments on contractor data handling and volunteer reporting queries. Kevin and Chris are covering H&S support queue and OSM escalations. Any items requiring her approval or sign-off must wait.
urgent.subject: Marie Handover 8-12 June
